pages: Sam was at the park. It was a hot sun.
Sam sat on the log. Sam got up. Sam ran.
Sam did not run on. Sam had to stop. 'What is that?' said Sam.
It was a red cap. Sam got the cap. 'This is not my cap,' said Sam.
Sam ran to Jess. 'Is this cap for you?' said Sam. 'No,' said Jess. 'It is not my cap.'
Sam ran on. Sam ran to the log. Tom was at the log. Tom was sad.
'Is this cap for you?' said Sam. 'Yes!' said Tom. 'My cap! I am so happy!'
Sam ran back to Jess. Sam was happy. It is good to help.
notes: This is a known-good Level 1 story for testing purposes. All words are either CVC decodable or Level 1 tricky words.
